# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
    tier: backend
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: data-processor
        tier: backend
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: data-processor:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          env:
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
            - name: SERVICE_MESH_BYPASS
              value: "enabled"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-ingester
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: stream-ingester
    tier: ingestion
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: stream-ingester
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: stream-ingester
        tier: ingestion
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: stream-ingester
          image: stream-ingester:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 4222
              name: nats
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: NATS_URL
              value: "nats://nats-server.high-performance.svc.cluster.local:4222"
            - name: BYPASS_PROXY
              value: "true"
            - name: MAX_CONNECTIONS
              value: "10000"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 4222
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 4222
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
    tier: data
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
        tier: data
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: database-proxy
          image: database-proxy:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http-health
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "750m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: POSTGRES_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: host
            - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              value: "redis-master.high-performance.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DIRECT_DB_CONNECTION
              value: "true"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-metrics-collector
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
    tier: observability
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
        tier: observability
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: metrics-collector:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8125
              name: statsd-udp
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 8126
              name: statsd-tcp
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          env:
            - name: UDP_BUFFER_SIZE
              value: "65536"
            - name: FLUSH_INTERVAL
              value: "1s"
            - name: DIRECT_UDP_ACCESS
              value: "true"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
spec:
  selector:
    app: data-processor
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-stream-ingester
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: stream-ingester
spec:
  selector:
    app: stream-ingester
  ports:
    - name: nats
      port: 4222
      targetPort: 4222
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-proxy
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-health
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-metrics-collector
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
    - name: statsd-udp
      port: 8125
      targetPort: 8125
      protocol: UDP
    - name: statsd-tcp
      port: 8126
      targetPort: 8126
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: high-performance
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    purpose: low-latency-services
